zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Saint-Pol於大約1107年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯時，她的父親Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin34歲，母親Beatrix de St.Pol11歲。她於1145年之前與Guy de Ponthieu II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1178年7月24日在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿別維爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida de Saint-Pol于大约1107年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯时，她的父亲Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin34岁，母亲Beatrix de St.Pol11岁。她于1145年之前与Guy de Ponthieu II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1178年7月24日在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿別維爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Saint-Pol was born about 1107, in Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, was 34 and her mother, Beatrix de St.Pol, was 11. She married Guy de Ponthieu II before 1145. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 24 July 1178, in Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Saint-Pol est née environ 1107, à Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de St.Pol, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Ponthieu II avant 1145. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 juillet 1178, à Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Saint-Pol um 1107 in Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin 34 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de St.Pol 11. Sie hat vor 1145 Guy de Ponthieu II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Juli 1178 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Saint-Pol è nata il circa 1107 nel Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de St.Pol, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Guy de Ponthieu II prima del 1145. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 luglio 1178, nel Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Saint-Polが約1107年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスで生まれた時，父Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdinは34歳，母Beatrix de St.Polは11歳であった。1145年以前にGuy de Ponthieu IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1178年7月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメアベヴィルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Saint-Pol(이)가 대략 1107년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de St.Pol(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1145년 이전 Guy de Ponthieu II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 7월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 애브베빌에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Saint-Pol nasceu aproximadamente 1107, em Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de St.Pol, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Ponthieu II antes 1145. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de julho de 1178, em Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Saint-Pol родилась около 1107 г. в местности норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de St.Pol, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Ponthieu II перед 1145 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 июля 1178 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida de Saint-Pol nació aproximadamente 1107, en Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Beatrix de St.Pol, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Guy de Ponthieu II antes de 1145. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de julio de 1178, en Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
